scripts.build: npm run build -w @sms-news/contracts && npm run build -w @sms-news/core && npm run build -w @sms-news/data && npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @sms-news/contracts && npm run build -w @sms-news/core && npm run build -w @sms-news/data && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
